channel.title: OpenAI-Selection
channel.description: OpenAI News から選別された記事フィード

item.title: 長期的モデルの時代における安全性とアライメント(Safety and alignment in an era of long-horizon models)
item.description: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-running AI models, highlighting new safety risks, observed failures, and improved safeguards through iterative deployment.
